title: Wedding & Event Sales Executive
description:
Responsibilities:

  • To liaise with clients directly on requirements, objective, budgeting and etc. To execute an event (wedding / corporate / solemnization) from enquiry to the actual day of event and post event servicing.
  • Main point of contact with the client
  • Establish or maintain cooperative relationships with clients to ensure client satisfaction and loyalty
  • Provide support in execution of events and campaigns
  • To work with Operations department to ensure success of events
  • To manage own events processes, including paperwork. Preparing of proposal and quotation for venue rental, wedding and menu.
  • Follow-up to ensure contract is signed by option date, receipts and final payments made promptly
  • To source for business leads via various means
  • Assist with event site viewings, feedback and post events follow-up

Requirements:

• Candidate must possess at least a Diploma, Advanced/Higher/Graduate Diploma, any field.

• Excellent command of written and spoken English

• At least 1 - 3 year(s) of working experience in corporate sales is required for this position.

• Good presentation skills

• High level of efficiency, initiative, meticulous with details and multi-tasking ability

• Independent, motivated, creative thinker with a positive and flexible attitude and a genuine passion for events sales management

• Desire for success

postedCompany.description:
In a metropolitan city like Singapore, where space is a luxury, finding a non-claustrophobic space to wind down and relax is not exactly an easy task. Located in Seletar area, Wheeler’s Estate occupies almost 2 acres of land making itself the largest F&B and event venue in Singapore promoting lifestyle and entertainment.

At Wheeler’s Estate, we proudly showcase our Australian Chef with his distinctive Modern Australian cuisine together with an outdoor charcoal grill – a perfect gathering spot for friends and families. With our exquisite scenic lawn and colonial architecture, we provide the perfect location for a wedding, corporate and other events that want to exude intimacy and uniqueness.

Wheeler's Estate is the ideal working environment for those who seek challenges and opportunities to develop their passion and skills in the F&B sector. We are constantly on a lookout for individuals who endorse our vision and are passionate to interact with people from all walks of life - crafting an intimate and unique experience for stakeholders of Wheeler’s Estate.
postedCompany.name: WHEELER'S ESTATE PTE. LTD.
